Zwi Migdal.description: A Jewish criminal organization founded in Poland in the 1860s, based mainly in Argentina. It trafficked women from Central Europe into sexual slavery and forced prostitution, operating until 1939. At its height, it had 430 members overseeing 2,000 brothels and 4,000 women in Argentina.

descriptions: The infobox lists Zwi Migdal as an ally of Ashkenazum.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Zwi Migdal

descriptions: Ashkenazum was a splinter group that broke away from Zwi Migdal.
edges.evidence_quote: Ashkenazum was founded by Simon Rubinstein as a splinter group from the larger Zwi Migdal

descriptions: Ashkenazum is a splinter group that split from Zwi Migdal.
edges.evidence_quote: Zwi Migdal later split and a splinter group led by Simon Rubinstein established its own society named Ashkenazum.

descriptions: Paybacc Crips is an ally of Fruit Town Piru.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Paybacc Crips

'Ndrina Arena.description: The 'Ndrina Arena is a 'ndrina (clan) of the 'Ndrangheta criminal organization based in Isola Capo Rizzuto, Calabria, Italy. It has influence in the Catanzaro area through alliances with local clans. The clan has been involved in drug and arms trafficking, counterfeiting, extortion, and murder, with operations extending to Brazil and Germany. Key figures include Nicola Arena and Carmine Arena.

descriptions: The Arena family, an 'ndrina, acted on behalf of 'Ndrangheta in money laundering and election fraud.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 23 febbraio 2010 , nell'ambito di un'inchiesta sul riciclaggio di capitali legati alla 'Ndrangheta , il senatore del PDL Nicola Di Girolamo viene accusato di aver partecipato ad un sodalizio criminale che, assieme a Gennaro Mokbel , personaggio collegato in passato ad ambienti della destra eversiva, avrebbe riciclato oltre 2 miliardi di euro e favorito l'elezione del senatore nel collegio estero di Stoccarda , ad opera della famiglia Arena , 'ndrina di Isola di Capo Rizzuto .

descriptions: 'Ndrina Arena is a subunit of the 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: La 'ndrina Arena è una cosca malavitosa o 'ndrina della 'ndrangheta calabrese

descriptions: Carpino is listed as an ally of Arena in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Alleati: Carpino, Costanzo, Dragone, Gaglianesi, Mannolo, Trapasso

descriptions: Costanzo is listed as an ally of Arena in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Alleati: Carpino, Costanzo, Dragone, Gaglianesi, Mannolo, Trapasso

descriptions: Dragone is listed as an ally of Arena in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Alleati: Carpino, Costanzo, Dragone, Gaglianesi, Mannolo, Trapasso

descriptions: Gaglianesi is listed as an ally of Arena in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Alleati: Carpino, Costanzo, Dragone, Gaglianesi, Mannolo, Trapasso

descriptions: Arena and Mannolo were targeted together in the same operation, but no direct relationship is stated.
edges.evidence_quote: operazione "Golgota" contro gli Arena, i Nicoscia e Mannolo

descriptions: Arena and Nicoscia were in conflict in the Isola feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Faida di Isola: scoppiata nel 2000 tra gli Arena e i Nicoscia.

descriptions: Arena and Nicoscia were in a feud in 2004.
edges.evidence_quote: La faida riprende nel 2004 con l'omicidio di Franco Arena scoppia una faida fra gli Arena -Dragone e i Nicoscia - Grande Aracri.

descriptions: Arena and Nicoscia are allies.
edges.evidence_quote: tra questi i Paparo, alleati dei Nicoscia e degli Arena

descriptions: Paparo are allies of Nicoscia and Arena.
edges.evidence_quote: tra questi i Paparo, alleati dei Nicoscia e degli Arena

descriptions: Trapasso is listed as an ally of Arena in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Alleati: Carpino, Costanzo, Dragone, Gaglianesi, Mannolo, Trapasso

descriptions: Arena is allied with Oliverio against Nicoscia.
edges.evidence_quote: Arena , alleati con la 'ndrina Oliverio di Belvedere di Spinello nella faida contropposta ai Nicoscia .

descriptions: The Paparo are allied with the Barbaro, Bubbo, Nicoscia, and Arena.
edges.evidence_quote: i Paparo alleati dei Barbaro, dei Bubbo, dei Nicoscia e degli Arena

descriptions: The 'Ndrina Costanzo is allied with the Arena clan.
edges.evidence_quote: La 'ndrina Costanzo è una cosca malavitosa o 'ndrina della zona di Catanzaro alleata con gli Arena di Isola di Capo Rizzuto .

descriptions: Dragone is allied with Arena.
edges.evidence_quote: La 'ndrina Dragone è una cosca malavitosa o 'ndrina della 'ndrangheta calabrese originaria di Cutro alleata con i Mannolo di San Leonardo di Cutro e gli Arena di Isola Capo Rizzuto e gli Arabia di Cutro.

descriptions: Girolamo Costanzo, a leader of the Gaglianesi, is also a referent for the Arena clan, indicating a cooperative link.
edges.evidence_quote: Girolamo Costanzo, capo e referente degli Arena.

descriptions: Grande Aracri was in a feud with Arena.
edges.evidence_quote: faida tra i Grande Aracri- Nicoscia -Capicchiano e Russelli e gli Arena - Trapasso - Dragone e Megna

descriptions: Arena is listed as an allied 'ndrina in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: 'Ndrine alleate - Arena (Isola Capo Rizzuto)

descriptions: The Maesano and Arena were historically allies but later engaged in a bloody feud starting in the 1980s.
edges.evidence_quote: Erano storicamente alleati con gli Arena, contro cui a partire dagli anni ottanta del XX secolo condurranno una lunga e sanguinosa faida per il controllo criminale del territorio

descriptions: The Maesano were once allied with the Arena.
edges.evidence_quote: I Maesano sono una 'ndrina che opera a Isola Capo Rizzuto , un tempo alleata con gli Arena .

descriptions: The Mancuso have links with the Arena clan.
edges.evidence_quote: nel crotonese dove hanno legami con il clan Arena di Isola Capo Rizzuto

descriptions: The Mancuso have ties with the Arena clan.
edges.evidence_quote: nel crotonese dove hanno legami con il clan Arena di Isola Capo Rizzuto

descriptions: Mancuso has ties with Arena.
edges.evidence_quote: nel crotonese dove hanno legami con il clan Arena di Isola Capo Rizzuto

descriptions: Mancuso 'ndrina has links with Arena 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: links with the Arena 'ndrina of Isola di Capo Rizzuto

descriptions: Megna was allied with Arena during a war.
edges.evidence_quote: era in corso una guerra tra i Megna alleati con gli Arena e i Nicoscia

descriptions: There is a faida (feud) between the Nicoscia and the Arena.
edges.evidence_quote: Nonostante a Isola Capo Rizzuto sia in corso una faida tra Nicoscia e gli Arena , dall'operazione Isola del 2009 sembra che in nome degli affari la faida in Lombardia , dove vi sono diramazioni delle cosche madri non sia arrivata e che i Paparo insieme a queste abbiano svolto le loro attività illecite .

descriptions: Paparo is allied with Arena.
edges.evidence_quote: alleata ... degli Arena

descriptions: The Arena 'Ndrangheta clan had direct contact with Sicilian mafia bosses.
edges.evidence_quote: Le indagini dei Carabinieri hanno rivelato che Nicola Arena, a capo dell'omonima cosca, era in contatto diretto con Pietro Vernengo e Nitto Santapaola, boss della mafia siciliana.

Lynx gang.description: The Lynx gang was a Birmingham-based gang originally composed of British Pakistani members, founded in the 1970s in the Sparkhill area to protect the local British Pakistani community from White power skinheads. It is known for having former member Moazzem Begg, who was part of an unofficial junior version of the gang.

descriptions: G2M is a younger subset of the Five Point Generalz.
edges.evidence_quote: Toronto Police conducted a series of raids across the Greater Toronto Area targeting the Five Point Generalz and mainly the younger subset G2M.

descriptions: Cártel de la Sierra is a splinter group of Beltrán-Leyva Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Cártel de la Sierra en Guerrero.

descriptions: BLA is listed as an ally of TTP in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Balochistan Liberation Army

Tub of Blood Bunch.description: Early New York waterfront street gang active in the late 1860s, based in the Corlears' Hook section of the East River. Formed from members of various gangs after a police cleanup of the Fourth Ward. Operated from a bar called the Tub of Blood. The gang faded into obscurity by the 1880s.

descriptions: Năm Cam learned casino business methods from Đại Cathay, indicating a mentorship or influence relationship.
edges.evidence_quote: Đại Cathay would go on to leave a lasting mark on Năm Cam, a mobster who would go on to later build his own fiefdom in Saigon during the 90s, and he did it mainly through his casino business, a method which he learned during his time of following Đại Cathay.

descriptions: Đại Cathay's gang fought a gang war with Tín Mã Nàm's gang in 1964.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1964, a bloody gang battle ensued between the two gangs when Đại and his followers attacked the Great World quarters of Chợ Lớn with knives, swords, and bayonets.

descriptions: After the conflict, Tín Mã Nàm negotiated and ceded territory to Đại Cathay.
edges.evidence_quote: Tín Mã Nàm was then forced to call for a negotiation with Đại, where he and many of the Chinese gangs in Chợ Lớn decided to give up away the areas between Nancy market and District 1 to Đại Cathay's gang.

descriptions: Hells Angels fought with Luton Town MIGs in a brawl.
edges.evidence_quote: Members of the Hells Angels' Lea Valley chapter took part in a mass brawl against a group from the Luton Town MIGs hooligan firm at the Blockers Arms public house in Luton in May 1990.

descriptions: Al-Shabaab has clashed with Ahlu Sunna Waljama'a.
edges.evidence_quote: Al-Shabaab has clashed with the pro-AMISOM Sufi militias of "Ahlu Sunna Waljama'a".

descriptions: SSNA split from MTA due to disagreement with Khun Sa's leadership.
edges.evidence_quote: some Shan nationalists in the MTA disagreed with his leadership and formed a rival Shan organisation, the Shan State National Army (SSNA)

descriptions: UWSA opposed Shan State National Army until 2005.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: ... Non-state opponents ... Shan State National Army (until 2005)

descriptions: Albanese-Cutellè-Tassone and Chindamo-Lamari-D'Agostino were in conflict in the Laureana di Borrello feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Faida di Laureana di Borrello : scaturisce all'inizio degli anni novanta tra le due fazioni Albanese-Cutellè-Tassone e i Chindamo-Lamari-D'Agostino

descriptions: Minichini and De Luca Bossa formed a joint group.
edges.evidence_quote: clan camorristico dei “Minichini-De Luca Bossa”

descriptions: De Luca Bossa clan merged with Minichini group.
edges.evidence_quote: After a time inactive, the De Luca Bossa clan is believed to be gaining power again in the eastern area of Naples... thanks to the merger with emergent groups as the Minichini and Schisa.

descriptions: CV has violently fought with Carolina Ramirez Front in the Amazon region.
edges.evidence_quote: the CV, PCC, Familia do Norte, and Colombian militia groups including the Border Command and the Carolina Ramirez Front have violently fought

descriptions: The Ciarelli clan ambushed the Di Rocco and Spinelli families in 1972.
edges.evidence_quote: quattro fratelli di una tribù nomade dei colli di Pescara (Ciarelli), armati di mitra, fucili e pistole, tendono un agguato a due tribù avversarie (Di Rocco e Spinelli)

Mali Boys.description: Organised street gang based in Leyton and Walthamstow, East London, controlling the local drug trade with extreme violence. Emerged in 2015 after splintering from the Beaumont Crew. Known for county lines drug networks, child exploitation, and hundreds of violent attacks. Estimated 40-100 members, predominantly male and ethnically diverse.

descriptions: Anyone Can Go is listed as a rival of Mali Boys in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Beaumont Crew / Let’s Get Rich (LGR), Priory Court (PC) / Higham Hill, CGM, Anyone Can Go (ACG), Custom House (CH), Peckwater (51st)

descriptions: Mali Boys killed a member associated with Beaumont Crew, indicating rivalry.
edges.evidence_quote: Jaden was associated with rival gang Beaumont Crew (also known as Let's Get Rich) and was allegedly out drug dealing at the time of death.

descriptions: Mali Boys splintered from Beaumont Crew.
edges.evidence_quote: The Mali Boys emerged in 2015 after it splintered off from the Beaumont Crew gang.

descriptions: Boundary is in alliance with or subsumed into Mali Boys.
edges.evidence_quote: Many smaller local gangs are in alliance or have been subsumed into the Mali Boys, such as Drive & Marlowe (DM), Boundary, Coppermill, and Stoneydown.

descriptions: CGM is listed as a rival of Mali Boys in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Beaumont Crew / Let’s Get Rich (LGR), Priory Court (PC) / Higham Hill, CGM, Anyone Can Go (ACG), Custom House (CH), Peckwater (51st)

descriptions: Coppermill is in alliance with or subsumed into Mali Boys.
edges.evidence_quote: Many smaller local gangs are in alliance or have been subsumed into the Mali Boys, such as Drive & Marlowe (DM), Boundary, Coppermill, and Stoneydown.

descriptions: Custom House is listed as a rival of Mali Boys in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Beaumont Crew / Let’s Get Rich (LGR), Priory Court (PC) / Higham Hill, CGM, Anyone Can Go (ACG), Custom House (CH), Peckwater (51st)

descriptions: Drive & Marlowe is in alliance with or subsumed into Mali Boys.
edges.evidence_quote: Many smaller local gangs are in alliance or have been subsumed into the Mali Boys, such as Drive & Marlowe (DM), Boundary, Coppermill, and Stoneydown.

descriptions: Peckwater is listed as a rival of Mali Boys in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Beaumont Crew / Let’s Get Rich (LGR), Priory Court (PC) / Higham Hill, CGM, Anyone Can Go (ACG), Custom House (CH), Peckwater (51st)

descriptions: Mali Boys engaged in a turf war with Priory Court.
edges.evidence_quote: The Mali Boys were reported to be in a 'turf war' with a group known as Priory Court or Higham Hill.

descriptions: Stoneydown is in alliance with or subsumed into Mali Boys.
edges.evidence_quote: Many smaller local gangs are in alliance or have been subsumed into the Mali Boys, such as Drive & Marlowe (DM), Boundary, Coppermill, and Stoneydown.

descriptions: Initially close, then became rivals over proceeds from bookmaking and gambling clubs.
edges.evidence_quote: They were close to criminals in the English Italian Sabini family. However, the two families became rivals because the Cortesi brothers believed they were being denied a fair share of the proceeds from bookmaking and West End gambling clubs.

descriptions: Jaysh ul Islam joined ISIS–K.
edges.evidence_quote: Notable among these are the Omar Ghazi Group, Shamali Khilafat, Gansu Hui Group, Harakat Khilafat Baluch, Jaysh ul Islam, Mullah Bakhtwar's group, the Shamsatoo group, and radical student groups in Pakistan and eastern Afghanistan.

Five Point Generalz.description: Canadian street gang based in Toronto, Ontario, founded in the late 1990s by five original members known as 'the five generals'. The gang is involved in drug trafficking, weapon trafficking, and robbery. It gained notoriety for its involvement in the 2005 Boxing Day shooting and the 2007 killing of Ephraim Brown. The gang remains active, with a major police raid in 2018 seizing 78 handguns and arresting 75 people.

descriptions: The two gangs were involved in a shootout that killed a bystander.
edges.evidence_quote: 11-year-old Ephraim Brown was killed by a stray bullet to the neck during a gang shootout, allegedly involving the Five Point Generalz and rival gang the Baghdad Crew

descriptions: G2M is a younger subset of the Five Point Generalz.
edges.evidence_quote: Toronto Police conducted a series of raids across the Greater Toronto Area targeting the Five Point Generalz and mainly the younger subset G2M.

descriptions: Los Piratas de Aragua son una facción del Tren de Aragua.
edges.evidence_quote: Rafael Gámez Salas, alias 'El Turco' de 39 años, en Texas, Estados Unidos, líder de 'los piratas de Aragua' una facción del tren de Aragua

descriptions: Los piratas de Aragua es una facción del Tren de Aragua en Chile.
edges.evidence_quote: Rafael Gámez Salas, alias ‘El Turco’ de 39 años, fue detenido el día 30 de diciembre pasado, en Texas, Estados Unidos, líder de "los piratas de Aragua" una facción del Tren de Aragua en Chile

descriptions: Galatolo clan fought Sorci clan over control of wholesale market racket.
edges.evidence_quote: The Acquasanta Mafia clan tried to muscle in on the protection racket that traditionally belonged the 'Mafia of the Gardens' — such as the Greco, Bontade and Sorci clans from the southeast of Palermo
